issue.title: GitClaw backup restore request: #589
issue.body:
<!-- gitclaw:backup-restore-request-issue id="backup-restore-20260601t201244z" backup_issue="589" source_issue="589" source_comment_id="0" source_sha256_12="84b9ca60db37" -->
GitClaw backup restore request issue.

- request_id: backup-restore-20260601t201244z
- restore_scope: issue-thread
- backup_issue: #589
- target_repository: AnandChowdhary/gitclaw
- backup_branch: gitclaw-backups
- backup_root: .gitclaw/backups
- repo_backup_dir: .gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw
- issue_backup_path: .gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/issues/000589.json
- index_path: .gitclaw/backups/AnandChowdhary__gitclaw/index.json
- source_issue: #589
- source_issue_url: https://github.com/AnandChowdhary/gitclaw/issues/589
- source_comment_id: 0
- source_kind: issue
- source_sha256_12: 84b9ca60db37
- approval_required: true
- restore_pr_required: true
- restore_mode: dry-run-first
- repository_mutation_allowed: false
- backup_branch_write_allowed: false
- github_api_replay_allowed: false
- raw_source_body_included: false
- raw_backup_bodies_included: false

Use this issue to review whether a backed-up conversation should be restored. Fetch `gitclaw-backups`, run the dry-run commands below, and keep any real restore behind an explicit human-approved pull request or separate recovery procedure.

### Required Dry-Run Commands
- `gitclaw backup verify --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- `gitclaw backup coverage --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw --issue 589`
- `gitclaw backup drill --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw --issue 589`
- `gitclaw backup restore-plan --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw --target-repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw --issue 589`
- `gitclaw backup manifest --root .gitclaw/backups --repo AnandChowdhary/gitclaw --issue 589`

### Approval Gates
- confirm the backup branch is fetched from the expected repository
- compare restore-plan output against operator intent without printing raw backup bodies here
- require a reviewed branch or separately approved recovery run before any restore or replay
issue.author: github-actions[bot]
